columns.exact_text: TEXT NOT NULL - The actual phrase/analogy/metaphor
columns.primitive_type: TEXT NOT NULL - phrase | analogy | metaphor | pivot | etc
columns.domains_json: TEXT - JSON array of domain tags

auto_sync_recommendation.rationale: Run sync script after adding primitives via retrieve_primitives.py add. Can hook into add_primitive() function later if automation desired.
auto_sync_recommendation.future_automation: Add post-add hook in retrieve_primitives.py or create scheduled agent for periodic sync

embedding_dimension_issue.problem: brain.db has 18 blocks with 384-dim embeddings (local model) mixed with 18,406 blocks at 3072-dim (OpenAI). Search fails when mixed dimensions encountered.
embedding_dimension_issue.solution: Need to re-embed the 18 old resources with OpenAI model, or delete them. This is outside W1.2 scope but blocks semantic retrieval.
embedding_dimension_issue.workaround: Script now auto-loads embedding_provider from N5/cognition/config.yaml to ensure consistent dimensions going forward.

lessons_sync_pattern.recommendation: W3.1 (lessons sync) can follow same pattern: virtual path like lessons://positions/{slug}, similar content format, same tag structure.

memory_client_limitation.issue: N5MemoryClient.search() retrieves ALL vectors first, then filters. With mixed embedding dimensions, search crashes before filtering can exclude incompatible vectors.
memory_client_limitation.fix_needed: Memory client should filter by path prefix BEFORE fetching vectors, or handle dimension mismatches gracefully.

config_auto_load.added: Script now reads embedding_provider from N5/cognition/config.yaml and sets N5_EMBEDDING_PROVIDER env var before importing memory client.
config_auto_load.benefit: Ensures consistent embedding dimensions without requiring env var to be set manually.
